intent_precise:
PCR2 set up: (1) Transfer 10µL from source (A1, A1) to destination (A1, A1). (2) Pause: Please replenish the tips in slots 8 and 11. Then resume. (3) Transfer from source A1 to destination A1. (4) Mix 4 times at 10µL. (5) Pause: PCR2 set up is complete.
                 Please proceed with PCR2 thermocycling followed by the pooling
                 and clean up steps.
intent: For the PCR2 setup, start by transferring 10µL from well A1 to well A1, then pause to replenish the tips in slots 8 and 11 before resuming. Once you've completed the second transfer from A1 to A1, mix the contents 4 times using 10µL volume. After mixing, the PCR2 setup is complete and you can proceed directly to the thermocycling program, followed by the pooling and cleanup steps.

commands.message: Please replenish the tips in slots 8 and 11. Then resume.

PCR2 set up is complete.
                 Please proceed with PCR2 thermocycling followed by the pooling
                 and clean up steps.
